description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a large, rounded handle and a wide, slightly flared rim. The exterior surface features a bold, black graffiti-style artwork that wraps around much of the cup's body, giving it an urban, street-art aesthetic. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping and is attached at the upper and lower portions of the cup. The cup's interior is plain and smooth, matching the white exterior base color. The graffiti design is abstract, with thick black lines and stylized shapes, but does not appear to form any recognizable text or logo. The overall finish is matte, with a hard, non-reflective surface typical of ceramic kitchenware.
description: A white ceramic cup with a large handle and bold black graffiti-style artwork wrapping around its exterior. The surface is matte and the design gives it a modern, urban feel.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the front, showcasing the large handle on the left and the start of the graffiti artwork prominently on the body.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cup's body without the handle visible, focusing on the central portion of the graffiti design.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the right, with the graffiti artwork continuing around the cup's surface, showing more of the abstract shapes.
description_view_3: The handle is centered and fully visible, with only the edges of the graffiti artwork peeking from either side.
